title: 100Pcs Paddle Bamboo Skewers 18CM Natural Wooden Cocktail Sticks Flat Burgers Sticks Wooden Fruits Picks for Drinks Charcuterie Cocktail Garnish Accessories Party Supplies
features: Natural Material: Made from carefully selected natural bamboo, it's washable, reusable, healthy and eco - friendly. Sturdy and suitable for grilling and buffets.
Convenient Grip: The flat - handle design offers a stable hold and easy piercing. Adds charm to parties, perfect for finger foods.
Easy Flipping: The wide - paddle handle makes flipping easy during grilling. Firm grip and sturdy skewers.
Party Essential: Ideal for picnics, camping and barbecue season. Great for making snacks and food.
Wide Application: Suitable for appetizers, kebabs, mini - burgers, etc. Also works as cocktail picks, a must - have for catering.
description: 100pcs 18cm Bamboo Skewers: Your All - in - One Culinary Solution We've crafted a pack of 100 bamboo skewers, each 18 cm long, designed to meet all your needs and offer unbeatable value. Exceptional Sturdiness Tired of flimsy skewers that break or sag? Our bamboo skewers are built with the right diameter, ensuring they're sturdy enough to hold heavy food without snapping or bending. Thread your kebabs, fish, or any other ingredients with confidence, and say goodbye to the hassle of falling food. Eco - Friendly Choice Bamboo is one of the most sustainable materials, and we've chosen it for our skewers to prioritize both your health and the environment. Enjoy guilt - free cooking and entertaining. Sharp and Convenient With sharp tips, our skewers pierce food effortlessly. Whether you're preparing a quick snack or hosting a big barbecue, save time and effort while threading meat, veggies, or cake decorations. Smooth Finish We focus on a smooth finish to prevent splinters. Thread your food quickly and safely, without the worry of getting hurt. From delicious kebabs to beautiful cake toppers, make every culinary and decorative task easier with our bamboo skewers.
